name: Motion Graphics
description: Kinetic typography and shape animation: text/graphics that animate in with choreographed timing, easing, and stagger; emphasis on rhythm, hierarchy through motion, and a clear focal beat. Built with GSAP/Web Animations or R3F for titles, intros, and explainer segments.

requiredElements.name: choreographed-timing
requiredElements.description: Elements animate with choreographed timing (stagger/overlap), not all at once.

requiredElements.name: easing-curves
requiredElements.description: Custom ease curves (ease-out/expo/power) used, never linear for organic motion.

requiredElements.name: focal-beat
requiredElements.description: A clear focal moment/beat where the eye should land (the message climax).

requiredElements.name: hierarchy-through-motion
requiredElements.description: Hierarchy conveyed via motion (primary elements lead, secondary trail).

requiredElements.name: loop-or-resolve
requiredElements.description: The piece either resolves cleanly to a final state or loops seamlessly; no abrupt end.

optionalElements.name: kinetic-typography
optionalElements.description: Text that transforms/moves expressively (split, scale, slide) to reinforce meaning.

optionalElements.name: shape-morph
optionalElements.description: Shapes that morph between states to connect ideas.

optionalElements.name: sound-sync
optionalElements.description: Animation synced to an audio beat/cue.

qualityRules.description: Stagger/overlap timing creates rhythm, not simultaneous pop.
Organic easing used throughout; no linear organic motion.
Clean resolve or seamless loop; no abrupt cutoff.
The focal beat is unambiguous (timing + scale + contrast lead the eye).
Typography has weight and scale presence.
Timing/duration values consistent within the piece (one timing scale).
Animations use transform/opacity (compositor), not layout-triggering props.
Animation timelines/observers are killed/disposed when the piece unmounts.

antiPatterns.description: Everything animates simultaneously, killing rhythm and hierarchy.
Linear easing on organic motion feels robotic.
An abrupt cutoff with no resolve feels unfinished.
Animating width/top/margin triggers layout and jank.

improvementSuggestions.description: Add kinetic typography to reinforce the message.
Add shape morphing to connect ideas.

exampleOutputs.label: Staggered text reveal
exampleOutputs.snippet: gsap.from(".line", { y: 24, opacity: 0, duration: 0.7, ease: "power3.out", stagger: 0.12 });
